customMetrics.name: LCP
customMetrics.script: return new Promise(resolve => new PerformanceObserver(list => list.getEntries().forEach(entry => entry.name === 'largest-contentful-paint' && resolve(entry.startTime))).observe({type: 'largest-contentful-paint', buffered: true}));

customMetrics.name: CLS
customMetrics.script: return new Promise(resolve => new PerformanceObserver(list => { let score = 0; list.getEntries().forEach(entry => { if (!entry.hadRecentInput) { score += entry.value; } }); resolve(score); }).observe({type: 'layout-shift', buffered: true}));
